metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Silverhaven.

key_dungeons.name: Ruined Crypt
key_dungeons.description: The air around Ruined Crypt shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Ruined Crypt and find the Bronze Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.

key_dungeons.name: Iron Vaults
key_dungeons.description: A spiral staircase carved from bedrock descends into Iron Vaults. The temperature drops with every step.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Venture into Iron Vaults and liberate the Onyx Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact pulses with ancient energy.

key_dungeons.name: Lost Vaults
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Lost Vaults. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Lost Vaults for the hidden Ivory Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.
